name: python3-pyasn1-modules
title: python3-pyasn1-modules
summary: Collection of protocols modules written in ASN.1 language (Python 3)
description:
Collection of protocols modules written in ASN.1 language (Python 3)
This is a small but growing collection of ASN.1 data structures
expressed in Python terms using pyasn1 data model.
.
It's thought to be useful to protocol developers and testers.
.
Please note that pyasn1_modules is neither part of the pyasn1 package
nor related to it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyasn1-modules because Collection of protocols modules written in ASN.1 language (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyasn1-modules as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyasn1-modules with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyasn1-modules --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
